name_en: 📣📣📣 【Original Leather with Full Counter Packaging】🔥🔥 Gucci Ophidia Bucket Bag Medium. The Gucci Ophidia Bucket Bag Medium is also a sales king. Unlike the mini bucket, this design adds a handle, increasing portability. It still retains the classic drawstring design, and the capacity has increased significantly, making it very practical. Highly recommended!! Model 550621 Size 20.5*26*11cm
